display.purpose: Hero headlines only, one per page.

label.purpose: Nav, buttons, form labels. Not uppercase-tracked by default.

shadows.name: resting
shadows.purpose: Bare-minimum lift for a card at rest, separation not announcement.

shadows.name: hover-bloom
shadows.purpose: Interactive hover/focus lift, paired with translateY(-3px).

shadows.name: achievement-glow
shadows.purpose: Reserved for Antique Brass achievement moments only.

motion.name: ease-out-quart
motion.purpose: Default easing for all transitions and reveals, no bounce.

motion.name: duration-breathe
motion.purpose: The hero wheel's slow ambient breathing-scale loop.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Cedar-filled pill CTA, the single most important action in a section.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #3C6B4A; color: #FDFBF7; padding: 15px 30px; border-radius: 999px; border: none; font-weight: 600; font-family: Raleway, sans-serif; cursor: pointer; transition: transform 180ms cubic-bezier(0.165,0.84,0.44,1), box-shadow 180ms cubic-bezier(0.165,0.84,0.44,1), background 180ms; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #6BAA75; transform: translateY(-2px); box-shadow: 0 12px 32px rgba(22,40,28,0.14); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #16281C; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Secondary Button (Scholarship path)
components.description: Clay Ember pill, reserved for the scholarship/apply thread so its warmth carries specific meaning.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { background: #A85D39; color: #FDFBF7; padding: 15px 30px; border-radius: 999px; border: none; font-weight: 600; font-family: Raleway, sans-serif; cursor: pointer; transition: transform 180ms cubic-bezier(0.165,0.84,0.44,1), box-shadow 180ms; } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { transform: translateY(-2px); box-shadow: 0 12px 32px rgba(168,93,57,0.22); } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #16281C; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Resting Card
components.description: Flat-by-default card with a hairline border, no shadow at rest; hover bloom only when interactive.
components.html:
A real baseline

64 questions across 8 dimensions of wellbeing.
components.css: .ds-card { background: #FFFFFF; border: 1px solid #E5E0D5; border-radius: 14px; padding: 28px; transition: transform 180ms cubic-bezier(0.165,0.84,0.44,1), box-shadow 180ms; } .ds-card.interactive:hover { transform: translateY(-3px); box-shadow: 0 12px 32px rgba(22,40,28,0.14); border-color: transparent; }

components.name: Achievement Badge Medallion
components.description: Custom-drawn circular seal for gamification badges, replacing emoji. Locked state in muted Bark Ink tones; unlocked state switches to Antique Brass plus the achievement glow.
components.css: .ds-badge { width: 64px; height: 64px; border-radius: 999px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; background: #F1EEE6; color: #8A8778; transition: all 320ms cubic-bezier(0.165,0.84,0.44,1); } .ds-badge--unlocked { background: #FBF3E1; color: #8F6F35; box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px rgba(201,161,90,0.35), 0 8px 28px rgba(201,161,90,0.28); }

components.name: Sticky Navigation
components.description: Translucent Linen bar with a functional blur (the system's one legitimate glassmorphism use) over scrolling content.
components.html: For CaregiversFor Sponsors
components.css: .ds-nav { display: flex; gap: 28px; padding: 14px 24px; background: rgba(253,251,247,0.92); backdrop-filter: blur(8px); border-bottom: 1px solid #E5E0D5; } .ds-nav-link { color: #454540; font-weight: 500; font-size: 0.95rem; text-decoration: none; } .ds-nav-link--active { color: #3C6B4A; font-weight: 700; }

narrative.overview: This is what it feels like to be the reliable one, finally offered something reliable in return. The system rejects two default temptations at once: the clinical calm of a healthcare product and the loud, cheerful gamification of a consumer wellness app. Instead: a grounded, natural palette carried with restraint, a real hand-built icon and graphic system in place of emoji, and motion that feels considered rather than decorative. The site is not a plain marketing shell wrapped around a plainer tool; the embedded Wellness Wheel assessment inherits the same palette, type, iconography, and elevation language as the marketing pages.
keyCharacteristics: A grounded natural palette (cedar green, warm clay) carried with restraint, not saturation.
A dedicated, sparingly-used achievement color (antique brass) that only appears at real milestone moments.
Hand-built line iconography and organic graphic motifs standing in for every emoji currently in the product.
Varied section rhythm: alternating layouts, not a repeating eyebrow-heading-card-grid template.
One deliberate deep-cedar drenched moment per major page for visual contrast and gravity.

rules.name: The Earned Gold Rule
rules.body: Brass never appears as decoration and never covers more than roughly 10% of any screen; if it shows up, the user just accomplished something real.

rules.name: The One Accent Rule
rules.body: Cedar carries the page. Clay appears second, for warmth and the sponsor/scholarship thread. Brass appears last and rarest.

rules.name: The Drenched Beat Rule
rules.body: Every page gets exactly one full-bleed Cedar Deep section, a structural downbeat, not a decoration repeated section after section.

rules.name: The No-Eyebrow Rule
rules.body: Small uppercase tracked kickers above every section heading are banned as a default rhythm device. At most one section per page may use one, and only when it does real labeling work.

rules.name: The Earned Shadow Rule
rules.body: No element gets both a visible border and a heavy resting shadow. Pick one.

dos: Do build every icon as a hand-drawn inline SVG in the system's line-icon language.
Do vary section rhythm across a page: alternate card grids with text+graphic rows, single diagrams, and asymmetric feature spotlights.
Do reserve Antique Brass strictly for earned achievement moments.
Do include one Cedar Deep drenched section per page.
Do use ease-out-quart/quint timing for all transitions, with a prefers-reduced-motion fallback on every animation.
donts: Don't use emoji anywhere in the shipped product.
Don't open more than one section per page with a small uppercase tracked eyebrow.
Don't repeat the identical icon-in-a-rounded-box, three-up card grid as the default answer for every group of ideas.
Don't pair a visible 1px border with a shadow of 16px blur or more on the same element.
Don't use border-radius above 20px on any card, section, or input.
Don't use background-clip text gradient headings.
Don't reach for glassmorphism as decoration beyond the sticky nav's functional blur.
Don't design the Wellness Wheel tool as a plainer app-register experience; it carries the same premium visual language as the marketing pages.
